mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `cmp_autocorr_setting`(`id`,`exorder`, `busdocumenttype`, `bankreccode`, `ourbanknum`, `othbanknum`, `money`, `abstract`, `ytenant_id`, `floatdays`, `create_time`, `create_date`, `modify_time`, `modify_date`, `creator`, `modifier`, `creatorId`, `modifierId`, `tenant_id`, `pubts`, `direction`) values (#{idCredit},1,2,1,1,1,1,1,#{ytenantid},0.00,NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,#{tenantid},#{pubts},'2');
INSERT INTO `cmp_autocorr_setting`(`id`,`exorder`, `busdocumenttype`, `bankreccode`, `ourbanknum`, `othbanknum`, `money`, `abstract`, `ytenant_id`, `floatdays`, `create_time`, `create_date`, `modify_time`, `modify_date`, `creator`, `modifier`, `creatorId`, `modifierId`, `tenant_id`, `pubts`, `direction`) values (#{idDebit},1,2,1,1,1,1,1,#{ytenantid},0.00,NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,#{tenantid},#{pubts},'1');
mapper.select: select id from cmp_autocorr_setting where tenant_id =#{tenantid} and ytenant_id=#{ytenantid} limit 1
select id from cmp_denominationsetting where currency=#{currency} and ytenant_id=#{ytenantId} limit 1
